requirements.jd_requirement: Design, implement, and tune high-fidelity detections across cloud, endpoint, SaaS, identity, and application environments
requirements.evidence: Built deployable security controls and endpoint remediation automation across macOS/Windows fleets, including BitLocker enforcement and patch orchestration — directly applicable to endpoint detection coverage gaps.

requirements.jd_requirement: Build and optimize queries, alerts, and correlation logic within our SIEM and EDR platforms
requirements.evidence: Designed and operated multi-source log ingestion pipelines with data normalization and entity resolution — directly transferable to SIEM/EDR query tuning and alert fidelity improvements.

requirements.jd_requirement: Participate in SOC on-call rotation and serve as escalation point for high-severity incidents
requirements.evidence: Led incident response workflows by building automated containment and remediation playbooks — reduces MTTR and provides escalation-ready operational rigor.

requirements.jd_requirement: Conduct proactive threat hunting to identify gaps in detection coverage
requirements.evidence: Applied Pandas/NumPy-based anomaly detection to security telemetry, surfaced drift between asset inventory and actual posture — ideal for proactive threat hunting.

requirements.jd_requirement: Build custom security tooling to improve alert enrichment, investigation, and response
requirements.evidence: Developed internal tooling using Python/Flask and integrated with Microsoft Graph API for enriched context — directly aligns with alert enrichment and investigation acceleration.

requirements.jd_requirement: Develop integrations between security tools and internal systems via APIs
requirements.evidence: Built cross-platform API workflows (e.g., ticketing + SIEM + EDR) to automate enrichment and reduce manual triage — matches SOC integration needs.

requirements.jd_requirement: Automate repetitive investigative workflows and containment actions
requirements.evidence: Created runbook-based containment scripts for endpoint and cloud incidents — reduces false positives and improves consistency.

requirements.jd_requirement: Contribute to guardrails and enforcement mechanisms across cloud and SaaS environments
requirements.evidence: Built IaC guardrails (Terraform/Ansible) for AWS IAM and secrets management — ensures secure-by-default cloud posture.

requirements.jd_requirement: Serve as technical escalation point for high-severity incidents and lead root cause analysis
requirements.evidence: Owned post-incident analysis and systemic improvements across cloud and endpoint environments — grounded in measurable risk reduction.

requirements.jd_requirement: Raise the technical bar within SOC through mentorship and code/detection review
requirements.evidence: Authored runbooks and standards for detection quality — enables scalable SOC maturity without formal people management.

tone_notes: Match Podium’s pragmatic, high-impact tone: emphasize building reliable systems over theoretical security, highlight operational outcomes (e.g., MTTR reduction, false positive reduction), and avoid buzzwords. Stress IC contribution over leadership — align with their ‘not a people management role’ framing.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a builder-operator who elevates SOC maturity through deployable detection engineering, cloud-native tooling, and automation that reduces manual toil — directly aligned with Podium’s AI-driven growth and operational rigor.
